case.title: NORTHERN v. TENNESSEE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES

opinion.h4: NORTHERN v. TENNESSEE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES, (1978)
opinion.h2: Mary C. NORTHERN, appellant, v. TENNESSEE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES No. 77-6354
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Motion to expedite denied.[ Northern v. Tennessee Department of Human Services (1978) ]
